headline: The Home Depot, Inc. (HD) Is A Top Richard Chilton Stock Pick
summary: The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) is one of the 10 Best Stocks to Buy According to Billionaire Richard Chilton. Home improvement retailer The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD)’s shares are down by 5% over the past year and are flat year-to-date. Wolfe Research discussed the firm on June 23rd as it cut the rating to Peer […]
